message:
tools: fix find tool path stripping using strip_prefix

Replace manual string slicing with proper Path::strip_prefix for
converting absolute paths to relative paths in find tool output.

Before: String-based prefix removal that could break on Windows paths
or edge cases with trailing separators.

After: Use Path::strip_prefix which correctly handles path components
and cross-platform path separators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
